title: Transform Award 2025
content: [vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]We are honored to have received the Transform Award 2025 by CxO Global Forum for pioneering Shariah-compliant Hajj & Umrah Savings.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

title: Celebrating the Spirit of Freedom
content: [vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]At 5th Pillar Family Takaful, we celebrated Independence Day with great enthusiasm. This day is not just a commemoration of our nation’s history—it’s a reminder of the values we strive to uphold every day: integrity, innovation, and a shared commitment to building a better future.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

title: Financial Awareness Sessions II
content:
[vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Continuing our commitment to financial awareness and smart money decisions, another informative session was conducted with a team from UBL Funds, who joined us to share insights on maximizing tax benefits through investments in Pension and Voluntary Pension Scheme (VPS) funds.

The training provided a detailed walk through of how pension fund investments can legally reduce tax liability while also helping to build long-term financial security.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

title: Training Session on Creating a Respectable Workspace
content: [vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][vc_single_image image=”9123″ img_size=”300×300″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][vc_single_image image=”9124″ img_size=”300×300″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]At 5th Pillar Family Takaful, employee training and development remain a top priority. In line with SECP regulations, we recently conducted a training session on Creating a Respectable Workplace .The session focused on understanding, addressing, and effectively responding to workplace concerns, reinforcing our commitment to a respectful and inclusive environment for all together, we move forward with awareness, empathy, and responsibility.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

Dressed in their finest and full of cheer, the team shared stories, laughter, and a delicious seaside buffet, making memories that perfectly captured the spirit of togetherness and celebration.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

The evening was a celebration of star performers, teamwork, and excellence. Renewed with energy and clear goals set, the teams are now ready to put their best foot forward this year.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

It was a moment to honor the invaluable role women play in driving the success and growth of the company.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

title: Leaders Eat Last
content:
[vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Leaders Eat Last[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1744014980093{margin-top: 0px !important;margin-right: 0px !important;margin-bottom: 0px !important;margin-left: 0px !important;}”]The 5th Pillar Family Takaful held a two-day training session for top-tier
management, where Nadym Chandna shared insights on leadership, strategic
decision-making, and aligning business goals with company values. The
session focused on fostering collaboration, adapting to market changes, and
embracing innovation.
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

title: Pinktober at 5th Pillar Family Takaful
content:
[vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Pinktober at 5th Pillar Family Takaful [/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1744015107774{margin-top: 0px !important;margin-right: 0px !important;margin-bottom: 0px !important;margin-left: 0px !important;}”]Pinktober at 5th Pillar Family Takaful The 5th Pillar Family Takaful
team observed Pinktober at the head office with an engaging session led by
Dr. Areej Zehra. The session provided extensive information on detection and
treatment, highlighting the importance of early diagnosis, preventive
measures, and raising awareness about breast cancer. Employees participated
actively, gaining valuable insights to help support the cause and promote
health within the workplace.
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

The session was well received by all the participants resulting healthy discussions towards the end of the session.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

title: Bank Islami Product Launch in Karachi
content:
[vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][vc_single_image image=”8073″ img_size=”300×300″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][vc_single_image image=”8075″ img_size=”300×300″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][vc_single_image image=”8076″ img_size=”300×300″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width=”1/3″][vc_single_image image=”8077″ img_size=”300×300″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][vc_single_image image=”8078″ img_size=”300×300″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][vc_single_image image=”8079″ img_size=”300×300″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop=”” hide_on_notebook=”” hide_on_tablet=”” hide_on_mobile=””][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited and BankIslami Pakistan Limited organized an interactive training session to launch distribution of innovative Hajj and Umrah Saving plans for Bank Islami’s customers across their nationwide branch network.

Representatives of both organisations attended the launch event and were grateful for the support and feedback from everyone who attended the event.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

title: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Teamed Up With IFMP
content:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]5th Pillar Family Takaful has teamed up with Institute of Financial Markets of Pakistan (IFMP) to meet with the learning and development requirements set by the Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan (SECP).
This strategic alliance underscores our unwavering dedication to empowering our team members with the knowledge and skills necessary to navigate the complexities of the financial services industry successfully.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

title: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Partners with Ping Up to Revolutionize Hajj and Umrah Saving Plans Distribution
content:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]5th Pillar Family Takaful, a leading provider of Takaful products and services, is pleased to announce a strategic partnership with Ping Up, Pakistan’s leading Digital Wealth Tech platform for financial products. The agreement was signed by Mr. Asim Raja, Chief Commercial Officer of 5th Pillar Family Takaful and Mr. Wajahat Jafri, Co-Founder (Pk) & Chief Commercial Officer of Ping Up. The signing ceremony was also attended by the Senior Management of both institutions.
This collaboration aims to enhance the accessibility of the Hajj and Umrah pilgrimage through its unique saving plans and its comprehensive end to end value chain, to new and existing customers of Ping Up. This partnership marks a significant milestone for 5th Pillar Family Takaful as it extends its reach into the alternative distribution segment. By partnering with Ping Up, a trusted entity in the financial services industry, 5th Pillar Family Takaful is well-positioned to increase the accessibility of its innovative saving plans to a broader customer base.
This collaboration is designed to cater to the evolving preferences of the younger generation of savers, offering them a user-friendly and digitally enabled platform to plan their journey of saving towards the Hajj and Umrah pilgrimage.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

title: 5 Pillar Bags award for the Most Innovative Takaful Product and Emerging brand.
content:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]So honored and humbled to be awarded at the 17th Consumer Choice Awards 2023 for the Most Innovative Takaful Product and Emerging brand.
We are just getting started – here’s to creating a bigger impact and working on our mission to make Hajj Easy for the millions of Pakistanis.
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

title: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Signs MoU with Bank Islami
content:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Bank Islami, a leading Islamic bank in Pakistan, and 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited signed an agreement whereby Bank Islami will distribute the unique Hajj and Umrah savings products developed by 5th Pillar through the Banks’ branch network across the country.
The agreement was signed by Mr. Asim Saleem – Group Head Distribution from Bank Islami and Mr. Asim Raja – Chief Commercial Officer from 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited. The signing ceremony was attended by Mr. Rizwan Ata CEO & President of Bank Islami and Mr. Nasar Us Samad Qureshi – CEO 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited along with other leading officers from both the institutions.
Speaking after the signing ceremony, M. Rizwan Ata stated: “We are excited about this partnership and what it means for our customers. At Bank Islami customer’s interest is of utmost importance and we are very pleased with the innovative offering presented by 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited”.
Mr. Nasar Us Samad Qureshi, CEO of 5th Pillar Family Takaful, expressed his gratitude for Bank Islami’s trust and pledged to uphold ethical and Shariah-compliant standards while delivering exceptional services to our mutual customers nationwide.
The collaboration between Bank Islami and 5th Pillar Family Takaful will enable the Bank’s customers to purchase the desired saving plans which will help them to realize their aspirations of performing Hajj and Umrah with comfort and ease with the support of the comprehensive end-to-end value chain from Pakistan to Saudi Arabia.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

title: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Agreement With YPay
content:
5th Pillar Family Takaful, entered into an agreement with YPay Financial Services (Pvt. Ltd.), an investment solution that provides fast, safe, and convenient investment services to new modern-day investors. This collaboration marks a significant milestone as this partnership is 5th Pillar Family Takaful’s first in the alternative distribution segment.

As innovators in their respective fields, 5th Pillar Family Takaful and YPay Financial Services have united with a shared vision to transform the way Hajj and Umrah saving products are offered and accessed. Through the cutting-edge YPay application, this partnership will provide a seamless, efficient, and inclusive platform for individuals aspiring to perform the sacred pilgrimage. What sets this collaboration apart is its focus on the younger generation of savers.

This landmark alliance between 5th Pillar Family Takaful and YPay Financial Services promises to reshape the landscape of Hajj and Umrah saving products, marking a significant step forward in the digitization of Takaful services and financial empowerment.

title: Dubai Islamic Bank and 5th Pillar Family Takaful collaborate to provide Hajj and Umrah Takaful Solutions
content:
Karachi: Dubai Islamic Bank (DIB), the first Islamic Bank of the world and 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited, the first takaful company to bring innovative Hajj and Umrah Savings products in Pakistan, have signed a strategic partnership aimed at addressing the spiritual aspirations of their esteemed customers. The signing of the agreement held at Dubai Islamic Bank Head Office, in Karachi marks a significant milestone in both Pakistan’s financial and spiritual landscape. This collaboration presents a complete solution, offering secure saving plans tailored for customers seeking to undertake the sacred pilgrimages of Hajj and Umrah, with a complete end-to-end value chain and pilgrimage services in Pakistan and Saudi Arabia.

Speaking at the occasion, Mr. Junaid Ahmad, CEO Dubai Islamic Bank, explained the unique value proposition of the Hajj and Umrah Savings Plans. He highlighted the unique merits, whereby the customers gain access not only to financial benefits but also to invaluable pilgrimage services provided by 5th Pillar Group, thereby increasing the overall appeal of the offering.

Echoing the sentiment, Mr. Nasar Us Samad Qureshi, CEO of 5th Pillar Family Takaful, expressed heartfelt gratitude for the trust reposed by Dubai Islamic Bank in 5th Pillar Family Takaful. He confirmed 5th Pillar Family Takaful’s commitment of maintaining the highest standards of ethical and Shariah-compliant products, while ensuring the delivery of exceptional services to the esteemed customers of Dubai Islamic Bank through its massive network of over 235 branches throughout the country.

Through this strategic partnership, Dubai Islamic Bank and 5th Pillar Family Takaful aim to empower customers in fulfilling their lifelong dreams of undertaking the sacred pilgrimages of Hajj and Umrah, with peace of mind. Starting from Pakistan, 5th Pillar aims to expand into other Muslim majority countries including Bangladesh, Indonesia, Turkey and Egypt in the near future with the continued support of its distinguished shareholders.

The signing ceremony was attended by senior leadership of both organizations , including Mr. Junaid Ahmad – President and Chief Executive Officer, Mr. Naveed Malik – Head of Consumer and Retail Banking, Mr. Syed Wajahat Ahmed – Head of Wealth Management, and Khan Sahban Shakeel – Head of Bancatakaful from Dubai Islamic Bank, alongside Mr. Nasar Us Samad Qureshi – CEO and Mr. Asim Raja – Chief Commercial Officer and Mr. Raja Muhammad Adnan – Business Head South from 5th Pillar Family Takaful.

title: Bank Alfalah and 5th Pillar Family Takaful Signs Bancatakaful Agreement
content:
Karachi – Bank Alfalah Limited, one of the largest commercial banks in Pakistan partnered with the 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited to sign an agreement to distribute the Hajj Savings plan, which will be supported by an end-to-end value chain that will facilitate customers to perform Hajj easily and comfortably. This structured savings solution is a disruptive and innovative product for people who wish to accomplish a significant religious milestone and undertake the sacred journey. The value chain, fully owned and operated by 5th Pillar Family Takaful and its sponsors, will ensure reliable and sustained services in Pakistan and Saudi Arabia and their dedicated teams will guide and support the pilgrims throughout their sacred journey. 

The signing ceremony, held at the Bank Alfalah Head Office in Karachi, was attended by leadership from both organisations, including Atif Bajwa, President and CEO along with Mehreen Ahmed, Group Head, Retail Banking, Arqam Butt, Head Liability Products, Asim Raja, Chief Commercial Officer of 5th Pillar Family Takaful. The ceremony was also attended by Abdul Aziz J. Burahma, Deputy CEO of 5th Pillar Holding, who specially visited Karachi from Kuwait to participate in the ceremony on behalf of the Board of Directors of 5th Pillar Family Takaful. The event showcased the shared commitment of Bank Alfalah and 5th Pillar Family Takaful to distribute and deliver the Hajj Savings Plan, which is a unique product infused with religious significance and offers devout Muslims a pioneering solution to save and prepare for the sacred journey of Hajj effectively.

Mehreen Ahmed, Group Head of Retail Banking, added, “We are delighted to introduce this initiative as we partner with 5th Pillar Family Takaful to bring its customers innovative Hajj Saving Plans. This initiative will provide a complete package as a unique one-window solution for customers embarking on the holy pilgrimage. The traditional way of saving for Hajj is often utilising personal savings, selling assets or relying on donations from family and friends. This can be difficult and time-consuming and does not offer any flexibility if your circumstances change. The 5th Pillar Hajj Saving Plan, on the other hand, allows you to save for Hajj systematically and organised, making it a truly disruptive product offering.”

Nasar Samad Qureshi, CEO of 5th Pillar Family Takaful, expressed his enthusiasm about this partnership, stating, “This strategic alliance allows us to expand our outreach, especially for offering Hajj saving plan to customers of Bank Alfalah across Pakistan backed by end-to-end value chain for facilitating the pilgrims both in Pakistan and in Saudi Arabia. We are committed to fostering long-term relationships based on trust, transparency, and togetherness.”

title: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited Sponsors Pakistan’s 3rd National Digital Health Conference
content: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited sponsors Pakistan’s 3rd National Digital Health Conference held in Lahore, on July 15, 2023. The conference served as a pivotal platform for experts, stakeholders, and visionaries to emphasize the significance of innovation and transformation in Pakistan’s healthcare sector, paving the way for a healthier and more accessible future.

title: The Zeal & 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited Celebrates Signing Of ZAML
content:
The Zeal and 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited celebrate the signing of ZAML.
Marking a new era in financial Industry, a game-changing solution in the fight against #MoneyLaundering. #ZAML (Zeal Anti Money Laundering) will now be fully integrated with Zeal Family Takaful platform.

Earlier Zeal has developed a highly parameterized state of the art Web-based platform providing complete solution for Family Takaful business.
The platform provides complete administration of Individual Takaful, Group Takaful, Group Health, Agency / distribution Channel Management along with integrated Contribution Accounting and General Ledger system.
Zeal ERP also includes supporting modules including but not limited to HRMS, Payroll, Recruitment, Employee On-boarding, Employee Self -Service and performance Management.

title: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited Signs Agreement with Al Meezan Investment Management Limited
content:
5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited has signed an agreement with Al Meezan Investment Management Limited, the largest Asset Management Company of Pakistan, marking the beginning of a strategic partnership for investment advisory services.

This strategic alliance will bring together the expertise and experience of both organizations to deliver unparalleled financial solutions to our valued clients for maximization of profits. We are confident that this partnership will elevate the standard of services promised by 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited in the takaful market.

title: SECP Grants A License To 5th Pillar Family Takaful
content:
KARACHI: The Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan (SECP) has granted a license to 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited to operate in Pakistan. The first foreign investment in the insurance sector after many years, 5th Pillar is majority owned by reputed business houses from Kuwait and supported by well-known investors from Pakistan.

The company has appointed Nasar-us-Samad Qureshi as Chief Executive Officer, who is a well known insurance professional with over 45 years experience in the industry in the UAE and Pakistan.

The 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited aspires to become a leading player in the family Takaful market offering innovative new products to the insuring public in Pakistan.

The company expects to commence business operations in the 2nd quarter of next year after securing necessary regulatory approvals for commencement of business.

title: Hajj Made Easy
content:
Hajj is a dream for all Muslims. The thought of being so close to the Ka’abah makes one shiver with overwhelming joy. Though we all wish to someday actually experience it, for many of us it seems like an unattainable goal. That’s where 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited comes in.

5th Pillar Takaful Limited provides a complete end-to-end value chain, supporting you from the moment you start saving till the moment you’ve performed Hajj and are back home. Along with flexible financial savings plans, they support you with registration, tickets, accommodation, and facilities during Hajj, making your experience as convenient and seamless as possible. This allows you to focus on the 5th pillar of Islam without any worries or distractions.

Creating a global, sustainable services model like this is a big challenge and therefore some of the most renowned and experienced investors have joined hands to make Hajj affordable and accessible for millions of fellow Muslims.

In the process, they have already achieved remarkable start:

1. Licensed by the SECP and backed by renowned investors from Kuwait and Pakistan with multi-billion dollar investments globally.

2. Largest ever FDI in the Pakistani Takaful Industry

3. Highest initial paid-up capital of PKR 2 Billion.

4. Secured “A+ Stable Outlook” IFS rating from PACRA, highest for a new company.

5. Will offer a complete range of innovative Takaful products with special focus on Hajj and Umrah, supported by state-of-the-art technology platforms.

6. The sponsors are developing a complete end-to-end value chain to facilitate cost-effective Hajj and Umrah experiences both in Pakistan and Saudi Arabia.

7. Starting in Pakistan, with the vision to expand to Bangladesh, Indonesia, Turkey, and Egypt.

title: Kuwaiti Investors Make Biggest FDI in Pakistan’s Takaful Sector
content:
5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited, a newly licensed Takaful company, has received the largest ever Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) in the Pakistani Takaful Industry. The company has raised a whopping PKR 2 billion paid-up capital and will offer a complete range of innovative Family Takaful products, with a special focus on Hajj and Umrah saving plans.

The company has received “A+ Stable Outlook” IFS rating from the Pakistan Credit Rating Agency (PACRA), making it the highest-ever for a new Takaful company. This achievement highlights the strong financial position and stability of the company, which is backed by renowned investors from Pakistan and Kuwait with multi-billion dollar investments globally.

The sponsors of the company are also developing a complete end-to-end value chain to facilitate cost-effective Hajj and Umrah experiences both in Pakistan and Saudi Arabia. This is a revolutionary endeavor to enable millions of Muslims in Pakistan and other countries to fulfill their dreams of performing Hajj with ease and comfort.

5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited has started its operations in Pakistan, with the vision to expand to Bangladesh, Indonesia, Turkey, and Egypt.

title: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Partners With Techaccess
content:
5th Pillar Family Takaful and Techaccess Pakistan: A Technological Collaboration

5th Pillar Family Takaful is excited to announce our partnership with Techaccess Pakistan, a leading IT infrastructure and services company. Our objective is to leverage the innovative capabilities of Oracle Cloud Infrastructure for hosting our core application and database.

This strategic collaboration signifies our commitment to adopting the latest technology solutions to improve our operations and services. By integrating Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, we aim to enhance our data management capabilities, increase application efficiency, and ensure a robust and secure IT environment.

Techaccess Pakistan’s expertise in technology infrastructure and Oracle’s superior cloud solutions align perfectly with our vision for digital transformation. The partnership will facilitate seamless data accessibility, scalability, and reliability, promoting efficient business processes and improved customer service.

As we continue to innovate and elevate our service offerings, this partnership marks a significant step towards a more technologically-advanced future for 5th Pillar Family Takaful. We’re thrilled to be on this journey with Techaccess Pakistan and look forward to a fruitful collaboration.

title: Team 5th Pillar Iftar Dinner At Kolachi
content:
In the spirit of unity and gratitude, Team 5th Pillar came together for an Iftar Dinner at Kolachi, a beloved dining spot known for its exceptional cuisine and picturesque views.

The Iftar dinner, a time-honored tradition during Ramadan, was a moment of reflection and bonding for our team. Breaking their fast together, the team shared stories, laughter, and appreciation for each other’s efforts and achievements.

This occasion served not just as a delightful respite from work but as an affirmation of our shared values and commitment.

title: Team 5th Pillar Celebrates “A New Beginning”
content:
We’re immensely proud of Team 5th Pillar’s significant accomplishments, all thanks to their unwavering commitment and dedication.

We’ve been honored with an A+ Credit Rating from PACRA, a reflection of our solid financial stability and testament to our clients’ trust.

Our record-breaking initial paid-up capital of PKR 2 billion further underscores our financial robustness, setting a new precedent in Pakistan’s Takaful sector.

Our crowning success is the SECP approval for our Hajj product, marking our commitment to offering innovative, Shariah-compliant Hajj packages.

These milestones, celebrated with a team lunch, illustrate our shared vision and the tireless efforts of our extraordinary team. Together, we strive to continue delivering unparalleled services to our clients.

title: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited & Meezan Bank Signs An MoU
content: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited and Meezan Bank signed an MoU to extend Group Life Coverage to the valued customers of Meezan Easy Home through 5th Pillar. This collaboration reflects our shared commitment to providing comprehensive financial solutions and ensuring the well-being of our customers.

title: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Partners With NIFT
content: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited successfully partnered with NIFT ePay to provide unique takaful and investment options.

title: Board of Directors Visits 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited
content:
Mr. Saleh Naser Al Selmi, Chairman, Board of Directors, along with fellow Directors Mr. Rami Habli and Mr. Baseer Baig visited 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited Head Office on 10th October, 2022. The honourable guests were received by Mr. Ali Rehman Muhammadi, Director, Mr. Nasar us Samad Qureshi, CEO and the 5th Pillar Team.

During his visit he chaired a Board Meeting and met with the team members as well. He also addressed the 5th Pillar team and reiterated the firm commitment of the sponsors to make the company a leading player in the country. He announced that the board has decided to increase the paid up capital from Rs700 Million to Rs2.00 Billion to strengthen the financial base of the company to secure the confidence of the insuring public in coming years. He also announced that Mr. Sohail Tabba has agreed to invest in 5th Pillar Family Takaful which was a great news. The confidence reposed by the new shareholders is indeed an additional morale booster for the 5th Pillar team.

On behalf of the team Mr. Nasar us Samad Qureshi, CEO assured the worthy directors commitment of the whole team to work hard to translate the vision of the sponsors into reality.

title: CEO with Mr. Lukas & Mr. Louis From Swiss Re Visits Head Office Karachi
content:
Mr. Nasar us Samad Qureshi, CEO of 5th Pillar, hosted a pivotal meeting with Mr. Lukas Müller and Mr. Louis Sadaka from Swiss at the Head Office in Karachi, Pakistan. The meeting aimed to explore collaboration opportunities between the two organizations, known for their commitment to innovation and excellence.

The agenda included discussions on potential areas of partnership, such as risk management and technological integration. Both parties expressed enthusiasm for working together, recognizing the alignment of their values and objectives.

The visit also included a tour of 5th Pillar’s Head Office, where the guests met key team members and gained insights into the company’s operations and vision.

The meeting concluded with a joint commitment to pursue a partnership that leverages the strengths of both 5th Pillar and Swiss. This collaboration symbolizes a convergence of vision and ambition, setting the stage for a promising journey that has the potential to create lasting value in the industry.

title: Shariah Advisor Visits Head Office Karachi
content: Dr. Mufti Imran Ashraf Usmani (Shariah Advisor) pays a visit to the Head Office in Karachi; congratulates the management on commencement of business operations.

title: Chairman, Saylani Welfare International Trust Visits Head Office Karachi
content: Muhammad Bashir Farooqi (Chairman, Saylani Welfare International Trust) visits the Head Office in Karachi; discusses promotion of public awareness about Takaful products with the management.

title: 5th Pillar Family Takaful participates at Silver Sponsor at PSoA conference
content: 5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited participated as Silver Sponsor in a conference organized by Pakistan Society of Actuaries recently in Karachi. The theme of the conference was ‘Trends Shaping Insurance and Takaful Industry’ and the objective of the conference was to enlighten the participants on the current developments in the Takaful/Insurance sector.

title: Chairman Cordoba LV Visits the Head Office
content: Mr. Zeshan Afzal (Chairman Cordoba LV) in discussion with Mr. Nasar us Samad Qureshi (CEO) during his visit to the Head Office
